docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY CHEUNG, MOSES AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, KEIKING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-18-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $100.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, KEIKING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-02-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-02-2026 BY MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF MOSES CHEUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEIKING LAM IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FLILE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, MOSES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAM, KEIKING $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,500.00, SEE ATTACHMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
